mapMarkers.name: 黑刀套装
mapMarkers.description: Full Set found under an arch. Includes Black Knight Hood, Black Knight Armor, Black Knight Gauntlets, Black Knife Greavess

mapMarkers.name: 卡利亚骑士套装
mapMarkers.description: The Carian Knight Set can be picked up next to a large tombstone, past the graveyard section of Raya Lucaria Academy. When you reach the gate entrance leading to the large rotating lift, make a hard right and look below the ledge, jump down and follow the narrow path where you'll see a group of Glintstone Zombies worshipping a tombstone.

mapMarkers.name: 锁子披肩软铠甲
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by an enemy Foot Soldier.

mapMarkers.name: 布制上衣
mapMarkers.description: Can be found at the chest at the end of the dungeon in Murkwater Cave

mapMarkers.name: 布制长裤
mapMarkers.description: Can be found at the chest at the end of the dungeon in Murkwater Cave

mapMarkers.name: 居民头巾（轻装）
mapMarkers.description: Can be found at the Capital Outskirts. Dropped by a single enemy, just as you leave the building after the staircase.

mapMarkers.name: 居民简装
mapMarkers.description: Chest Armor. Found on a corpse on the balcony accessible from the Gateside Chamber Site of Grace.

mapMarkers.name: 熔炉之斧胸甲
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by Crucible Knight Ordovis

mapMarkers.name: 熔炉之斧头盔
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by Crucible Knight Ordovis

mapMarkers.name: 熔炉护臂
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by Crucible Knight Ordovis

mapMarkers.name: 熔炉腿甲
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by Crucible Knight Ordovis

mapMarkers.name: 火焰习武修士护手
mapMarkers.description: Part of the Fire Monk Armor Set. Obtained when defeating the Fire Monk Abbot, leader of the camp.

mapMarkers.name: 步兵头盔
mapMarkers.description: Looted from a Foot Soldier when defeated.

mapMarkers.name: 步兵头盔（B）
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Foot Soldier south of Tombsward Site of Grace.

mapMarkers.name: 步兵护手
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a solder in a small camp near the bridge.

mapMarkers.name: 蓝色粪金龟头
mapMarkers.description: Found inside a chest. From the garden section where you encountered the hostile NPC Moongrum Carian Knight, go west, by the gate, hug the wall and jump over the fence. Follow the path and then climb the ladder. The chest is inside the room at the top of the ladder.

mapMarkers.name: 葛瑞克骑士护腿
mapMarkers.description: Greaves looted from a Godrick Knight at Gatefront Ruins.

mapMarkers.name: 葛瑞克骑士套装
mapMarkers.description: A Knight Armor Set Dropped by Gordick Knights in Fort Haight.

mapMarkers.name: 神皮使徒套装
mapMarkers.description: Armor set comprised of the Godskin Apostle Hood, Godskin Apostle Robe, Godskin Apostle Bracers and Godskin Apostle Trousers. Dropped by the Godskin Apostle boss at the bottom of the Divine Tower of Caelid upon his defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 龟壳盾
mapMarkers.description: Small Shield. Found on a corpse atop the eastern-most tower of the Castle Morne Ramparts. This area can be reached by using Torrent to jump from the Spiritspring located just east of the Site of Grace nearby.

mapMarkers.name: 希罗达斯辉石头罩
mapMarkers.description: Light Helmet. Found on a corpse behind a house in the southern side of the village.

mapMarkers.name: 强盗兜帽
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Bandit at the Murkwater Cave

mapMarkers.name: 小恶魔头罩（猫）
mapMarkers.description: Helm. Found on a corpse inside the Impaler's Catacombs.

mapMarkers.name: 小恶魔头罩（狼）
mapMarkers.description: Found inside Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs

mapMarkers.name: 少年学者帽
mapMarkers.description: Light Helmet. Found by touching a ghost at the graveyard. This ghost also gives Juvenile Scholar Robe and 1x Larval Tear.

mapMarkers.name: 少年学者长袍
mapMarkers.description: Light Chest Armor. Found by touching a ghost at the graveyard. This ghost also gives Juvenile Scholar Cap and 1x Larval Tear.

mapMarkers.name: 凯丹头盔
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a sword-wielding knight.

mapMarkers.name: 卡勒罗斯辉石头罩
mapMarkers.description: Drops from the Crystallized Crab that can be found by a corner on the west side of the academy's courtyard.

mapMarkers.name: 皮甲套
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Leyndell Solder at Leyndell Royal Capital. You can find him past the first Leyndell Guard, turn right until you see the second Leyndell Guard. On your right, you will see a soldier on his knees, kill him to obtain this item

mapMarkers.name: Marais面具
mapMarkers.description: Light Helm. Dropped by Maleigh Marais, Shaded Castle Castellan upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: Marais长袍
mapMarkers.description: Light Chest Armor. Dropped by Maleigh Marais, Shaded Castle Castellan upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 信心面具
mapMarkers.description: Helm. Found on a corpse laying on the walls of the secret area of the Carian Study Hall unlocked using the Carian Inverted Statue.

mapMarkers.name: 奥利维尼斯辉石头罩
mapMarkers.description: Looted from a corpse on a narrow path that leads back to the Schoolhouse Classroom site of Raya Lucaria Academy. You need to pass through the illusory wall and jump over the balcony on the left, and circle back to the said site of grace. To find the illusory wall, go to the hallway from the schoolhouse classroom site, turn left. The illusory wall is in front of the corpse inside the room.

mapMarkers.name: 医师套装
mapMarkers.description: Armor Set. Found on a body in Seluvis's Rise after reaching the end of Ranni's questline.

mapMarkers.name: 南瓜头盔（1）
mapMarkers.description: Helm. Dropped by the Pumpkin Head enemy at the left side of the back of Castle Morne's main courtyard.

mapMarkers.name: 南瓜头盔（2）
mapMarkers.description: Headgear. Dropped by Pumpkin Head

mapMarkers.name: 腐败决斗者
mapMarkers.description: Leggings dropped by the large rotten duelist enemy guarding the rear of Ordina, Liturgical Town.

mapMarkers.name: 腐败守墓者斗篷
mapMarkers.description: Chest Armor dropped by the boss of Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs.

mapMarkers.name: 圣人风帽
mapMarkers.description: Can be found in Stillwater Cave - Liurnia of the Lakes, just ahead and below the Lake Facing Cliffs, it's all sitting on a poison submerged corpse near the end, guarded by an Giant Bats that will attack you when you take it.

mapMarkers.name: 圣人护腿
mapMarkers.description: Can be found in Stillwater Cave - Liurnia of the Lakes, just ahead and below the Lake Facing Cliffs, it's all sitting on a poison submerged corpse near the end, guarded by an Giant Bats that will attack you when you take it.

mapMarkers.name: 圣人长袍
mapMarkers.description: Can be found in Stillwater Cave - Liurnia of the Lakes, just ahead and below the Lake Facing Cliffs, it's all sitting on a poison submerged corpse near the end, guarded by an Giant Bats that will attack you when you take it.

mapMarkers.name: 乐观者套装
mapMarkers.description: Full Sanguine Set dropped by Sanguine Noble NPC invasion. Includes Sanguine Noble Hood, Sanguine Noble Robe and Sanguine Noble Waistcloth.

mapMarkers.name: 旅行套装
mapMarkers.description: Set includes: Traveler's Hat, Perfumer's Traveling Garb, Traveler's Gloves, Traveler's Slops, can be found on a corpse in a corner in the ruins.

mapMarkers.name: 双贤辉石头罩
mapMarkers.description: Drops from a Crystallized Crab once killed. You'll find it outside the second-floor balcony, east section of the Church of the Cuckoo in Raya Lucaria Academy. It's hiding by the corner of the scaffolding.

mapMarkers.name: 贵族长袍
mapMarkers.description: Found at the end of tha passageway. Beware of the Bedouin on your left side.

mapMarkers.name: 粗俗的民兵长手套
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by an enemy in the same group that also drops Vulgar Militia Helm

mapMarkers.name: 粗俗的民兵舵
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by an enemy located in a small group, near a big tree.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：连续射击
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab found in the narrow channel north of Seethewater River.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：铁壁盾防
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by Night's Cavalry Miniboss found patrolling the roads around the Castle Morne Ramparts. Only appears at night.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：鲜血斩击
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Dropped by a Beast Crest Heater Knight fought at the top of the ramparts of Fort Haight.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：伟哉卡利亚
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War. Found on a corpse on the roof of a tall stone structure. This is accessible by jumping down the cliffside graveyard from the manor's upper level.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：突击
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab. You'll find it attached to a ceiling, under some Poison Pods.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：寒气冻雾
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab in the ruins south of Renna's Rise.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：决心
mapMarkers.description: It drops from a Teardrop Scarab, north of Agheel Lake, near a group of soldiers.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：狩猎巨人
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by the lone wandering Troll Knight.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：黄金树立誓
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War: Golden Vow provides Sacred affinity and the Golden Vow Skill. Dropped upon defeating Mounted Knight.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：重力
mapMarkers.description: Looted from a Slender Wayfarer that uses the Gravitas skill as one of its attacks when it fights. You can find the enemy roaming by the beach side at the stone arch that has a bonfire, near the Seaside Ruins Site of Grace.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：坠落震击
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab found rolling down the hill west of the Minor Erdtree in Mistwood.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：冰霜踏地
mapMarkers.description: Ash Of War Upgrade. Dropped by an invisible Teardrop Scarab roaming around the shallow water. Look for its glowing footprints and attack as the prints move towards you.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：夺命拳
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab near the Caelid Highway.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：闪电斩
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab in the middle of an enclosed area just outside the Capital Outskirts.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：狮子斩
mapMarkers.description: Drops from the Lion Guardian in Fort Gael upon defeating it.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：罗蕾塔的斩击
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War. Dropped by Royal Knight Loretta upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：强力射击
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab found along the road as it slopes upwards.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：双吻毒蛾
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Dropped by the Night's Cavalry miniboss roaming the highway upon defeat. Only appears at night.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：祈祷重击
mapMarkers.description: On the lake under the short rocky tunnel, dropped by the invisible mob that leaves paw prints on its path.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：连击
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by Night's Cavalry that roams the bridge near Agheel Lake North, only appears at night.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：神圣刀刃
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab, situated next to a noticeable whirlwind.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：箭步（横扫）
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Found by defeating an invisible Teardrop Scarab roaming around the beach. You will see glowing footprints appearing in a set pattern around the area. Stand in front of its path and attack as it approaches you to reveal the creature.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：风暴足
mapMarkers.description: Found in the southeastern area of Gatefront Ruins. There is a set of stairs that leads to a small room with a treasure chest. This item is found alongside Whetstone Knife.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：风暴壁障
mapMarkers.description: Find a spherical small creature, defeat it to obtain the Ash of War.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：唤起风暴
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War Upgrade. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab in the northern section of the castle.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：剑舞
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab. It can be found in the rocky area, where some Ghost Jellyfish dwell. entern a cavern-like structure.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：托普斯的力场
mapMarkers.description: Ash of War. Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab found on a small isle on the western side of the lake.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：转啊转
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by an invisible Teardrop Scarab. You will see glowing footprints appearing in a set pattern around the area. Stand in front of its path and attack as it approaches you to reveal the creature.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：居合
mapMarkers.description: Can be obtained from a Teardrop Scarab located in the water. Beware of the Giant Crab nearby.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：无敌
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab, in the southwestern swampy area.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：拉满弓
mapMarkers.description: Dropped from a Teardrop Scarab located in the middle of the path leading from the Stormhill Shack site of grace to the Castleward Tunnel site of grace.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：附魔射击
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Teardrop Beetle hiding behind a rock near a brazier in Nokron, Eternal City.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：准备架势
mapMarkers.description: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab found rolling around at the edge of the cliff in Siofra River.

mapMarkers.name: 战灰：仿身泪滴
mapMarkers.description: Spirit Ashes. Found in a chest locked behind an imp statue door in Nokron, Eternal City.

mapMarkers.name: “盗火”亚当
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. Imprisoned within the Malefactor's Evergaol. Drops the Flame of the Fell God spell upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 石肤白王
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss imprisoned within the Royal Grave Evergaol.

mapMarkers.name: “黑刀之首”亚勒托
mapMarkers.description: Optional boss, fought at the Ringleader's Evergoal. Drops Black Knife Tiche

mapMarkers.name: “古龙”兰斯桑克斯
mapMarkers.description: A large white 4 winged dragon.

mapMarkers.name: 萨米尔的古英雄
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss imprisoned within the Weeping Evergaol.

mapMarkers.name: 法姆·亚兹拉的兽人（龙墓洞窟）
mapMarkers.description: Duo Boss encounter against two beastmen at the end of Dragonbarrow Cave. One wielding a Greatsword and one wielding Throwing Knives. Drops the Flamedrake Talisman +2 upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 法姆·亚兹拉的兽人（近林洞窟）
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. Found at the end of the Groveside Cave mini-dungeon. Drops the Flamedrake Talisman.

mapMarkers.name: 黑剑眷属
mapMarkers.description: Boss found at the entrance of the Bestial Sanctum. Drops Gargoyle's Blackblade and Gargoyle's Black Halberd

mapMarkers.name: 黑剑眷属B
mapMarkers.description: Black Blade Kindred is massive gargoyle that wields a huge halberd and appears in multiple locations.

mapMarkers.name: 黑刀刺客
mapMarkers.description: Field Boss. Can be found inside the Deathtouched Catacombs. Drops Assassin's Crimson Dagger.

mapMarkers.name: 黑刀刺客（亚坛高原）
mapMarkers.description: Optional boss found at the entrance of Sainted Hero's Grave. Drops Black Knife

mapMarkers.name: “猎犬骑士”达瑞威尔
mapMarkers.description: Boss of Forlorn Hound Evergaol. Drops the Bloodhound's Fang Curved Greatsword

mapMarkers.name: “卡利亚骑士”波尔斯
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. Imprisoned within the Cuckoo's Evergaol. Drops the Greatblade Phalanx spell upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: “冻结冰雾”玻列琉斯
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. Drops Dragon Heart

mapMarkers.name: 墓地影子
mapMarkers.description: Found inside Tombsward Catacombs. Drops Lhutel the Headless

mapMarkers.name: 尊腐骑士
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss found at the end of the Stillwater Cave. Drops the Winged Sword Insignia upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 老将欧尼尔
mapMarkers.description: Great Enemy. Drops Commander's Standard and Unalloyed Gold Needle

mapMarkers.name: 熔炉骑士
mapMarkers.description: Found within Stormhill Evergaol, this is a solo fight without Spirit Ashes or player summons. Drops the Incantation Aspects of the Crucible: Tail

mapMarkers.name: 熔炉骑士B
mapMarkers.description: He is fought alongside Crucible Knight Ordovis

mapMarkers.name: 熔炉骑士C
mapMarkers.description: found at the bottom floor of the Rampart Tower. Drops Aspects of the Crucible: Horns

mapMarkers.name: “熔炉骑士”奥陶琵斯
mapMarkers.description: Crucible Knight Ordovis, found at Auriza Hero's Grave. Drops Crucible Axe Set and Ordovis's Greatsword

mapMarkers.name: 结晶人（圆刃刀）
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. Found at the bottom-most level of Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnel. Drops Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing (1).

mapMarkers.name: 结晶人
mapMarkers.description: Duo Field Bosses. Found at the end of the Academy Crystal Cave. Drops the Crystal Release sorcery spell upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: “步入腐败”艾格基斯
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. Found guarding the Caelid Highway South.

mapMarkers.name: 亚人首领
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. A duo of Demi-Human bosses found deep within the Coastal Cave. Required to defeat in order to access the Church of Dragon Communion location. Drops the Tailoring Tools and Sewing Needle key items upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: “亚人女王”玛姬
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss. Found in the northeast section of Hermit Village. Drops a Memory Stone and Golden Rune (1) upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: “亚人女王”玛格
mapMarkers.description: Optional Field Boss. Found in the lowest level of the Volcano Cave.

mapMarkers.name: 龙装大树守卫
mapMarkers.description: Required to enter Leyndell, Royal Capital. Found right outside the capital's entrance.

mapMarkers.name: 老龙桂奥尔
mapMarkers.description: Massive boss surrounded by dragons. Drops 10,845 Runes and x5 Dragon Heart

mapMarkers.name: “铁棘”艾隆梅尔
mapMarkers.description: Found inside The Shaded Castle. Drops Marais Executioner's Sword and Briar Greatshield

mapMarkers.name: 黄金树的化身
mapMarkers.description: Miniboss found guarding the Erdtree. Drops the Opaline Bubbletear and Crimsonburst Crystal Tear upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 黄金树的化身（盖利德）
mapMarkers.description: Field Boss. Drops Greenburst Crystal Tear and Flame-Shrouding Cracked Tear upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 黄金树的化身（利耶尼亚东北）
mapMarkers.description: Field Boss. Drops Holy-Shrouding Cracked Tear, Lightning-Shrouding Cracked Tear and Magic-Shrouding Cracked Tear

mapMarkers.name: 黄金树的化身（利耶尼亚西南）
mapMarkers.description: Field Boss. Drops Cerulean Crystal Tear and Ruptured Crystal Tear

mapMarkers.name: 归树看门犬（断崖下的地下墓地）
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss found at the end of the Cliffbottom Catacombs. Drops the Kaiden Sellsword Ashes upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 归树看门犬（穿刺地下墓地）
mapMarkers.description: Found within Impaler's Catacombs. Drops Demi-Human Ashes upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 归树看门犬（小黄金树地下墓地）
mapMarkers.description: Duo boss fight against a Watchdog wielding a Sword and another wielding a Scepter. Drops the Mad Pumpkin Head Ashes upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 归树看门犬（风暴根脚的地下墓地）
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss found at the end of Stormfoot Catacombs. Drops Noble Sorcerer Ashes upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 归树看门犬（威达姆地下墓地）
mapMarkers.description: Optional boss found at the end of the Wyndham Catacombs. Drops Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing (1) upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 坠星兽物
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss found at the end of the Sellia Crystal Tunnel. Drops the Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (1) as well as 1 x Somber Smithing Stone (6), 5 x Smithing Stone (7) and 4x Gravity Stone Chunk upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 恶兆孪生子
mapMarkers.description: Bulky ogre-like beasts wielding flaming armament.

mapMarkers.name: “飞龙”亚基尔
mapMarkers.description: Great Enemy. Fight at higher levels. Rewards a Dragon Heart you can use at the Church of Dragon Communion.

mapMarkers.name: “飞龙”桂雷尔
mapMarkers.description: Found at the bridge, drops Dragon Heart

mapMarkers.name: 坠星成兽
mapMarkers.description: Optional Field Boss found high up in Mt. Gelmir.

mapMarkers.name: 巨型魔像
mapMarkers.description: Dormant Golem guarding the divine bridge.

mapMarkers.name: “辉石龙”亚杜拉（玛努斯·瑟利斯大教堂）
mapMarkers.description: This is a Great Enemy Boss Fight located at Cathedral of Manus Celes and is optional.

mapMarkers.name: “辉石龙”亚杜拉（三姊妹）
mapMarkers.description: Great Enemy. Found roaming the sub-region of Three Sisters.

mapMarkers.name: “辉石龙”史玛拉格
mapMarkers.description: A fearsome magic dragon with crystalized magic formation for scales. Guards the Academy Glintstone Key.

mapMarkers.name: “接肢”葛瑞克
mapMarkers.description: The Lord of Stormveil and the first Demigod encountered. Drops Godrick's Great Rune and Remembrance of the Grafted upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 神皮使徒（盖利德）
mapMarkers.description: Great Enemy. Found at the basement of the Divine Tower of Caelid (See page for how to reach). Drops the Godskin Apostle Set upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: “接肢”贵族后裔
mapMarkers.description: Optional Miniboss. Patrols the main hall of his fortress. No special drops.

mapMarkers.name: “接肢”贵族后裔
mapMarkers.description: A Grafted Scion can be found at the destroyed camp across the stone pillar, at the bottom of the cliffs.

mapMarkers.name: “接肢”贵族后裔（教程）
mapMarkers.description: Boss fought within the tutorial stage at Chapel of Anticipation.

mapMarkers.name: 守墓斗士
mapMarkers.description: Found within Murkwater Catacombs.

mapMarkers.name: 魔像守卫
mapMarkers.description: Found within the Highroad Cave. Drops Blue Dancer Charm

mapMarkers.name: 狮子混种
mapMarkers.description: Optional Greater Enemy Boss. Can be found by heading southeast from the "Beside the Rampart Gaol" Site of Grace, through the wooden bridge and down a ladder onto the shores below. Drops the Grafted Blade Greatsword upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 狮子守卫
mapMarkers.description: Optional Miniboss. Found hiding in the bushes near the eastern bridge entrance. No special drops. Can be skipped if you stick to the north as you pass by.

mapMarkers.name: 发狂南瓜头士兵（奇列姆废墟）
mapMarkers.description: Duo Boss Fight against two Mad Pumpkin Heads. They are found in an underground room, the entrance to which is in the eastern side of the ruins. No drops but allows access to a treasure room upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 发狂南瓜头士兵（驿站街废墟）
mapMarkers.description: Field Boss. Found directly below the Waypoint Ruins.

mapMarkers.name: 熔岩土龙
mapMarkers.description: Optional Boss, found inside Gael Tunnel. Drops x1 Dragon Heart and Moonveil

mapMarkers.name: 熔岩土龙马卡尔
mapMarkers.description: This Boss fight is accessed through Ruin-Strewn Precipice, upon reaching the Ruin-Strewn Precipice Overlook Site of Grace.

mapMarkers.name: “恶兆妖鬼”玛尔基特
mapMarkers.description: A large, apparently elder creature, self-proclaimed as "The last of all kings". Drops Talisman Pouch and 12000 Runes upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 黑夜骑兵（盖利德）
mapMarkers.description: Night's Cavalry Miniboss. Roams the Caelid Highway South. Only appears at night. Drops Ash of War: Poison Moth Flight upon defeat.

mapMarkers.name: 黑夜骑兵（宁姆格福）

These can be found as Ghostly Tortoises that you need to attack. The first is just a few steps directly to the north, opposite the entrance. There is another one hiding in the bushes left of the steps leading up to the tower. The last one is found in a pond slightly west of the tower and is invisible until struck. Attack near the center of the pond to reveal the Tortoise. Once all three have been defeated, the tower's seal is broken.

mapMarkers.name: 打刀
mapMarkers.description: Found inside the Deathtouched Catacombs. It is in a body, hanging from the upper platform. You need to use the lever in order to reach that room. Beware of the Skeleton Archers.

mapMarkers.name: 战镐
mapMarkers.description: Looted from one of the many Undead Soldiers.

mapMarkers.name: 软鞭
mapMarkers.description: Whip. Found on a corpse inside the building known as the Rampart Gaol. This building is first accessed by walking atop the western wall of the castle. Look to the left for a building with a blue roof. Jump onto this roof and then jump down to the cliffs below. Follow the cliffs southeast until you return to a section of the castle with a big square opening. Descend into the opening by landing on the wooden beams. There is a corpse with a Smithing Stone [2] on one of the beams and there are several Rats and a Harpy at the ground level. The corpse with the whip is sitting against a wall.

mapMarkers.name: 石肤白王剑
mapMarkers.description: Drops from an enemy in the Underground. You have to raise the platforms to get up to him by stepping on the buttons around the swamp. There are two buttons that are next to small columns or obelisks. Once you get raised on the platform, take on the long and narrow path, after a few meters you will be greeted by this enemy. kill him to obtain the Alabastrer Lord's Sword.

mapMarkers.name: 龙戟
mapMarkers.description: Halberd. Obtained when defeating the Dragonkin Soldier in Siofra River.

mapMarkers.name: 角弓

mapMarkers.name: 蘑菇王冠
mapMarkers.description: Helm. Found on a corpse hanging off of a pillar ruin in the south-eastern corner of Lake of Rot. Climb around the outside of the ruin to reach it.
